title: AI-Based Fingerprint Enhancement System
summary: Preprocessing pipeline using Gabor filtering and morphological operations that improved fingerprint matching accuracy by ~18% on a 500+ sample benchmark.
body:
## Problem

Low-quality fingerprint scans reduce matching accuracy in biometric systems. Noise, blurring, and poor contrast make feature extraction unreliable.

## Approach

Built a preprocessing pipeline using Gabor filtering to enhance ridge patterns and morphological operations (erosion, dilation) to clean and binarize the fingerprint image before matching.

## Results

Improved matching accuracy by ~18% on a 500+ sample benchmark compared to unprocessed inputs.
